skill_availability_goal: Verify that feature-implementor blocks implementation planning when PRD and TRD feature paths do not match.
prompt: 请根据 docs/pm/chat-interface/history-search/PRD.md 和 docs/engineer/chat-interface/TRD.md 实现 Chat History Search。PRD feature_path 是 chat-interface/history-search，但 TRD feature_path 是 chat-interface。请判断下一步，不要写 IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN 或代码。
